5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%';

2.sql: SELECT DISTINCT arkartstd, arjordbr FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1103'));

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct category values for arjordbr and arkartstd to identify agricultural land code(s)

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger by kommunenummer, including teigid and geometry

4.description: get AR50 polygons for agricultural land (filtered by the code found in step 2) to reduce national layer by category

5.description: reduce AR50 polygons to Stavanger extent by intersecting with municipality geometry (step 1)

6.description: find teig parcels (step 3) that intersect the reduced agricultural AR50 polygons (step 5)

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid (group by teigid)

10.description: return only teigid for the final result
